person.name: Hugo Alves Dutra
person.title: Software Engineer
person.summary: Full-stack developer with over 15 years of experience building scalable web and mobile applications. Strong background in JavaScript and TypeScript, with hands-on work in microservices, BFF, distributed systems, CQRS architectures, and modernization of legacy platforms.

education.details: Final graduation project: 3D simulator of carbon nanotubes developed with Delphi and OpenGL.

projects.name: AI Customer Service API
projects.summary: API for WhatsApp and web widgets for support bots using NestJS and LangChain, with RAG support, embeddings for PDFs/texts, synthetic data generation, and integration with OpenAI tools.

projects.name: AI-Based Ticket Creation Workflow
projects.summary: Automated support workflow integrating n8n, GLPI and WhatsApp for ticket create/query/update and knowledge-base retrieval with contextual responses.
